summary: Tested Create Flow with Ad Option and Settings Ad Center. All features working correctly: Desktop sidebar Create button between Bookings and Wallet, CreatePost page with Photo/Video/Camera/Create Ad buttons, Feed CreatePostModal with all options, Settings Ad Center with Overview/Activity/Analytics tabs, and backend my-analytics endpoint.
seed_data_creation: Password reset for admin user to TestPass123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Create flow with Ad option fully working. Sidebar has Create button (data-testid='nav-create') between Bookings and Wallet. CreatePost page (/create) has Photo, Video, Camera, and Create Ad buttons. Feed CreatePostModal has Photo, Video, Camera, and Create Ad options. Settings has Ad Center card with Overview, Activity, Analytics tabs. Backend /api/ads/my-analytics returns user's ad performance metrics (impressions, clicks, CTR, per-ad stats).

Desktop Sidebar Create Button.description: Create button found with data-testid='nav-create', positioned between Bookings (idx 4) and Wallet (idx 6)

CreatePost Page (/create).description: Page has Photo button (data-testid='photo-select-btn'), Video button (data-testid='video-select-btn'), Take Photo button, and Create Ad button (data-testid='create-ad-btn')

Feed CreatePostModal.description: Modal has Photo (data-testid='post-photo-select'), Video (data-testid='post-video-select'), Camera (data-testid='post-camera-capture'), and Create Ad (data-testid='post-create-ad') options

Settings Ad Center.description: Ad Center card (data-testid='ad-center-card') found with Overview, Activity, and Analytics tabs. Analytics tab shows Total Impressions, Total Clicks, Click-Through Rate, Total Spent, and Per-Ad Performance

GET /api/ads/my-analytics.description: Returns 200 with total_impressions, total_clicks, ctr, total_spent, active_ads, and per_ad_stats array

GET /api/ads/my-submissions.description: Returns 200 with ads array and counts (pending, approved, rejected)

GET /api/ads/config.description: Returns 200 with frequency, min_posts_before_first_ad, and variants
